query:
INSERT INTO subscribers (email, name, status, newsletter, source, unsubscribeToken, subscribedAt, totalSent, totalOpened)
VALUES 
  ('annaclara.borella@cofidis.it', 'Annaclara Borella', 'active', 'ai4business', 'manual', UUID(), NOW(), 0, 0),
  ('edoardo.riccobono@camperiosim.com', 'Edoardo Riccobono', 'active', 'ai4business', 'manual', UUID(), NOW(), 0, 0),
  ('sandro.parisi@eudata.com', 'Sandro Parisi', 'active', 'ai4business', 'manual', UUID(), NOW(), 0, 0),
  ('acquisti@felsineo.com', NULL, 'active', 'ai4business', 'manual', UUID(), NOW(), 0, 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'active';
